title: polypodium ruffum
intro: Polypodium ruffum, also known as the rough polypody, is a type of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium ruffum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Polypodium ruffum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a topical application such as a salve or ointment.
